"[5] PER RP HE WAS ON FOOT - VEH HIT HIM - THEN DRVR GOT OO VEH AND ASSAULTED HIM "FOR A MINUTE AND A HALF - THATS A PRETTY LONG TIME" - INQ W/RP SEV TIMES IF MEDICAL NEEDED - RP JUST KEEPS REPEATING "I JUST WANT TO MAKE A POLICE REPORT" - FINALLY REFUSED MEDICAL"
